---
title: "Complex Analysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    html-math-method: katex
---

Complex analysis is the study of Complex numbers and their properties. 

## Table of Contents

- Motivation (TO-DO)
- Axioms (FINISH PROOFS)
- Complex Numbers
- - Basic properties (Beta)
- Complex Functions
- - Exponentials
- - Square roots / Unity
- Derivatives
- - Sequences
- - Limits
- - Derivatives
- - Holomorphic functions
- Integrals
